title: [ExportVerilog] Fix i0 value emission of struct operations

features.name: struct with zero-width field assigned from undefined variable
features.description: Code should include a packed struct with a zero-width field where the struct literal assignment references a variable that does not exist in the scope

features.name: packed struct containing empty packed struct field
features.description: Code should include a packed struct that contains another packed struct with no fields (zero-width) as one of its members
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed {} empty_t;
typedef struct packed { empty_t addr; logic [31:0] data; } s_t;
